violations.text: Sausage and cheese were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit (over stacked in prep unit). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed items in freezer for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the retail and back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Bagels were observed stored in non-food grade plastic bags. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice maker, -freezer units, -prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The walls and ceiling in the back storage area is in poor repair (observed holes, previous water damage, and exposed insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. V&D poster given to PIC via email. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in back storage area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back storage was blocked by mop buckets. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was lacking handwashing soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Deli meat was observed held at (44-50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Working containers of food product are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair(detaching from wall). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The floors in the kitchen and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
The ceilings in the back storage area is in poor repair(tiles ripped and/or holes). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
